moments.author: Freedom 250 Organizers
moments.quote: America, it's time to celebrate! Rain or shine, the American people deserve a celebration worthy of our nation’s historic 250th birthday.
moments.why: This post signaled the resumption of 250th anniversary celebrations on the National Mall after evacuations, blending patriotism with resilience.

moments.author: Angel City FC
moments.quote: The organization called the incident a “fireworks malfunction”… we are working with our pyrotechnics vendor to review the incident and evaluate appropriate next steps.
moments.why: A post recognizing a dangerous fireworks mishap—sparking debate over event safety and response from the club.

moments.author: U.S. Soccer
moments.quote: Wishing everyone a safe and happy July fourth! 🇺🇸🦅
moments.why: The USMNT’s official account marked Independence Day, blending national pride with World Cup momentum.
